results.rendered_html:
vidala a.
1 Split, rent asunder.
2 Opened, blown (as a flower &c.).
— laḥ
1 Dividing, separating.
2 Rending, splitting.
3 A cake.
4 Mountain ebony.
— laṃ
1 A basket of split bamboos or any vessel of wicker-work.
2 The bark of pomegranate.
3 A twig.
4 The chips of a substance.
5 Split peas.
